description: Curation Labs Darwinian Harness Cards Catalog V1

cards.name: critic
cards.description: Composable critic role: adversarially return a draft's gaps, unsupported claims, and likely errors. A deep-research panel role; reusable standalone. Skill-only, no MCP servers.

cards.name: deep-research
cards.description: Deep Research — worker running a multi-agent research panel: the deep-research orchestrator fans out isolated subagents per role (researcher, synthesizer, critic, gap-filler, fact-checker), runs a stateful critic-and-gap-fill loop, and fact-checks before delivering a cited report. Self-contained: bundles all 5 role skills + Parallel Search MCP for web grounding.

cards.name: desktop-e2e-mq8oc2m1
cards.description: Disposable Desktop sidecar live test card from test_folder

cards.name: dh-card-base
cards.description: Personal base card bundling the 12 current-lane Darwinian Harness skills.

cards.name: external-reporter
cards.description: Regular card for external-facing status reporting: bundles the reporting-progress-externally, avoiding-ai-fingerprints, svg-figure-workflow, and descriptive-terms-over-jargon skills plus Notion and Slack MCP. Subagent-invoked.

cards.name: fact-checker
cards.description: Composable verification role: verify each load-bearing claim against its cited source. A deep-research panel role; reusable standalone. Skill-only, no MCP servers.

cards.name: fal
cards.description: fal.ai image/video/audio generation for any harness: the hosted fal MCP over 1,000+ models (Flux, Veo, Kling, Sora) authenticated with a bearer FAL_AI_API_KEY.

cards.name: gap-filler
cards.description: Composable gap-filling role: close one named gap with sourced findings. A deep-research panel role; reusable standalone. Skill-only, no MCP servers.

cards.name: knowledge-docs
cards.description: Keep knowledge documentation in sync with the codebase: draft new docs from the code, audit existing docs for drift, and restructure them into a categorized hierarchy.

cards.name: live-context
cards.description: Personal context assistant card. Encodes meeting recordings into corrected, speaker-mapped transcripts, organizes them in a dated memory folder with persistent conventions, and connects workspace apps such as Notion and Slack with the discipline to write into them safely.

cards.name: live-context-extended
cards.description: Team-owned variant of @leeminseung/live-context for Curation Labs. Same three personal-context skills (meeting transcript encoding, dated memory organization, standing conduct policies) plus Notion and Slack MCPs. Intended to evolve with team-specific conventions on top of Matt's baseline.

cards.name: math-research-helper
cards.description: Mathematical research rigor toolkit — anchors problems against known results, audits proofs step-by-step, stress-tests claims against edge cases, locates core difficulty, and guards against fabricated rigor in write-ups. Includes search MCPs for literature lookup.

cards.name: meeting-transcriber
cards.description: Meeting Transcriber — worker composing audio-prep (input + video→audio extraction) + personal-context-store (the ASR correction glossary is its instance) + a transcription spine that gates uncertain names/terms to the user WITH audio timestamps before finalizing raw + enriched transcripts. Self-contained (no external memory system) + Notion MCP. Subagent-invoked.

cards.name: notion
cards.description: Comprehensive Notion specialist. Full ntn CLI access (raw API, pages, databases, file uploads, workers) and an authoring layer for well-structured pages, safe edits, database queries, and disciplined writing, plus workflow skills for research write-ups, knowledge-base capture, spec-to-implementation tracking, and meeting prep.

cards.name: parallel-search
cards.description: Reusable web-search MCP card: real-time web search + fetch (Parallel) for grounding any Darwinian Mind. Bring your own Parallel API key (Bearer service token); works at lower limits without one.

cards.name: pr-reviewer
cards.description: Intent-aligned PR reviewer with structured JSON output and six-criterion rubric

cards.name: researcher
cards.description: Composable research role: investigate one angle and return sourced findings, grounded with real-time web search (Parallel Search MCP). A deep-research panel role; reusable standalone.

cards.name: synthesizer
cards.description: Composable synthesis role: merge findings into one answer-first, cited draft. A deep-research panel role; reusable standalone. Skill-only, no MCP servers.

cards.name: interviewer
cards.description: Interviewer — interview a person to elicit, develop, and record intent/preferences/decisions: adaptive interviewing + idea development + diverse-option sampling, persisting decisions via the Memory Curator. Subagent-invoked.

cards.name: memory-curator
cards.description: Memory Curator — file-native memory worker: extract salient facts, consolidate (dedup/update, deterministic max-by-time + temporal invalidation, human-gated), and retrieve (reactive, relevance-gated) over a MEMORY.md index + one-fact files. No vector DB. Subagent-invoked.

cards.name: work-planner
cards.description: Work Planner — turn goals + a time budget into a prioritized, parallelized plan via well-known frameworks (SMART, Eisenhower, MoSCoW, Critical Path, three-point estimation, timeboxing) over recalled context. Subagent-invoked.
